column1: # eq65_68_2a_case_law.csv — U.S. 2A legislation, ATF rules & SCOTUS rulings time-series (1911–2024)
# Equations: eq:65 (L_E >> L_O extraction precondition), eq:66 (agenda path x_0→x_m),
#            eq:67 (restriction accumulation R_t), eq:68 (target expansion O_racialized→O_racialized∪I_buffer)
# Sources:
#   Legislation / ATF rules:
#   - Sullivan Law (1911): N.Y. Laws ch. 195 [cite: sullivanlaw] — STATE legislation
#   - National Firearms Act (1934): 26 U.S.C. ch. 53 [cite: nfa1934] — FEDERAL legislation
#   - Mulford Act (1967): California AB 1591 [cite: mulford1967] — STATE legislation
#   - Gun Control Act (1968): Pub. L. 90-618 [cite: gca1968] — FEDERAL legislation
#   - Hughes Amendment (1986): FOPA, Pub. L. 99-308 [cite: hughes1986] — FEDERAL legislation
#   - Brady Act (1993): Pub. L. 103-159 [cite: brady1993] — FEDERAL legislation
#   - Federal AWB (1994): Pub. L. 103-322 [cite: awb1994] — FEDERAL legislation (sunset 2004)
#   - AWB Lapse (2004): sunset clause expired — FEDERAL restriction removed
#   - Bump Stock Ban (2018): 83 Fed. Reg. 66514, ATF reclassified as machinegun — ATF ADMIN RULE
#   - Ghost Gun / Frame-Receiver Rule (2022): ATF Final Rule 2021R-05F — ATF ADMIN RULE
#   - Pistol Brace Rule (2023): ATF Final Rule 2021R-08F — ATF ADMIN RULE (later vacated)
#   SCOTUS rulings:
#   - DC v. Heller (2008): 554 U.S. 570 [cite: heller] — individual right
